title: Drymonia stenophylla
taxonomy: Drymonia stenophylla belongs to the family Gesneriaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This family comprises about 130 genera and over 3,000 species. Drymonia stenophylla is further classified within the tribe Episcieae. The Episcieae tribe is a group of plants that are primarily found in Central and South America. Drymonia stenophylla is a species of flowering plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central America.
